channel.title: Integration on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Integration on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Logic Apps Codeful Workflows with Logic Apps Standard SDK.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps Standard SDK now has a public preview for codeful workflows, letting teams define workflows in code while using managed orchestration and enterprise connectors. The update targets integration and automation scenarios that want code-based development with cloud-scale operations.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public preview: Connector Namespace
item.description:
Azure has introduced Connector Namespace in public preview. It is a managed service intended to simplify app integration with SaaS and line-of-business systems by providing pre-built connectors instead of custom API client code.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Logic Apps MCP Server.
item.description:
Azure Logic Apps MCP Server is now generally available, aimed at making existing workflows callable by AI agents and MCP-based tooling without building custom API layers. The update focuses on reducing integration plumbing and operational complexity.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot for Jira: Our latest enhancements
item.description:
GitHub says it has added new enhancements to the GitHub Copilot cloud agent for Jira integration. The update focuses on making the integration more powerful and customizable, with more control for teams.

  • Source: GitHub
